state.phase: Deep code review + codebase cleanup complete, DB migration live
state.summary: Ran full project review (standard depth) then deep 4-agent code review identifying 37 findings. Executed all cleanup phases: 3 CRITICAL security fixes (XSS in error boundaries, JSON-LD, GA script), removed 3 unused dependencies (next-sitemap, schema-dts, @testing-library/react), deleted 6 dead files, removed dead types/exports/props, fixed 7 bugs (sitemap, group-hover, contact constants, API validation order, Person schema sameAs, dynamic yearsInBusiness). Net -460 lines. 38/38 tests, clean build. Separately, the project has been migrated to Drizzle ORM with Railway PG for leads and attribution.
nextActions: Set up Telegram notification group for Paragon leads
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID on Vercel for analytics
Claim Google Business Profile for all 3 locations (business owner action)
Add apple-touch-icon.png and populate site.webmanifest icons array
